{"code":"(def unresolved-issues (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"}))
(def top-issue (apply max-key :count unresolved-issues))
(insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body (:title top-issue)})
{:title (:title top-issue) :count (:count top-issue) :id (:id top-issue)}"}
